name: maidsclaw
description: TypeScript+Bun agent engine with Rust native modules

scripts.test:acceptance:app-host: bun test test/cli/acceptance.test.ts test/cli/debug-commands.test.ts test/app/app-host.test.ts test/app/session-close-flush.test.ts test/app/facade-contract.test.ts test/architecture/import-boundaries.test.ts
